hooks.command: git status --porcelain -- docs-site | grep -q . && { [ -d docs-site/node_modules ] && { npm --prefix docs-site run build >/tmp/cortex-astro-build.log 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"docs-site changed: astro build OK"}' || echo '{"systemMessage":"docs-site changed: astro build FAILED (tail /tmp/cortex-astro-build.log)"}'; } || echo '{"systemMessage":"docs-site changed but node_modules missing; run npm --prefix docs-site ci"}'; } || true
